# RAG Packet Template

Use this template when the desk must hand retrieval/RAG work to another desk or implementation agent.

```yaml
workflow_mode:
current_stage: retrieval-rag-design-desk
capability_id:
user_goal:
acceptance_criteria:
risk_tier:
approval_state:
source_facts:
assumptions:
open_questions:
corpora:
corpus_owners:
permission_boundaries:
privacy_classification:
source_hierarchy:
ingestion_policy:
chunking_policy:
embedding_policy:
index_strategy:
ranking_policy:
reranking_policy:
permission_filters:
citation_rules:
freshness_policy:
grounding_contract:
refusal_defer_rules:
retrieval_eval_cases:
retrieval_metrics:
observability_hooks:
validation_gates:
hard_halts:
soft_gaps:
ready_to_continue:
downstream_handoff_targets:
```
